The errors indicated are absolute errors and they are a
combination of the statistical errors, neutron
detection efficiency errors, target thickness errors,
and calibration errors of the current integrator. This
combined error is about 10% or less, except for the
measurements in 29Si at 7.01 proton energy where the
errors are 30%. The errors in the proton energy are
